name: delinea_privilege_manager
explanation: Delinea Privilege Manager is a vendor security marketplace tile with no Agent metric check. The spec defines only a `logs` template (TCP/UDP syslog ingestion at a user-supplied port) and the `datadog_checks/delinea_privilege_manager/` package contains no `.py` check implementation. Required setup is on the upstream Delinea side (configure syslog forwarding to the Agent's TCP/UDP listener); there is no host/port/endpoint to discover from the Agent's vantage point and no service for a probe to fingerprint. Auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply.
notes: Logs-only marketplace tile (pattern N variant: syslog-receive-only, not DogStatsD). The Agent receives syslog from the upstream product; the user must configure the forwarder on Delinea, which is not discoverable from the Agent.
